Halasa reports receipt of grant support from Merck and receipt of consulting fees as a member of an advisory board for CSL-Seqirus. Hillary Crandall reports institutional support from the National Institute of General Medical Sciences, NIH and from Mortensen and Milne for expert testimony. Danielle M.
